differential_diagnoses: Meconium aspiration syndrome with air leak complications
next_steps: Obtain high-resolution computed tomography (HRCT) of the chest with contrast
Perform diagnostic bronchoscopy to evaluate for airway obstruction or anatomical anomalies
Perform thoracentesis or ultrasound-guided aspiration of the pleural effusion for gram stain and culture
Consult pediatric surgery for potential surgical intervention if imaging reveals a malformed lobe or cyst
Continue titration of ventilator support and pulmonary hypertension management
